visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and red eye makeup sits in the passenger seat of a car. She is wearing a white ruffled off-shoulder blouse and is strapped in with a black seatbelt. She gazes upwards out of the window with her mouth agape in anticipation, while the background shows blurry green foliage and a grey headrest. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a large urban building with floor-to-ceiling glass windows reflecting the sky. Large banners in Korean text are visible, including a prominent circular logo featuring green and red semi-circles, which resembles a retail brand. Green trees are seen at the bottom of the frame. (3) Returning to the car interior, the woman now looks confused. She points her right index finger towards the window with a slight frown and squinted eyes, questioning what she sees. The lighting is natural and bright from the car window. (4) A brief cutback to the same glass building exterior, emphasizing the white and blue signage and the circular brand logo against the reflective glass panels. (5) The woman leans her chin against her hand, looking disappointed and sighing. She stares ahead with a resigned expression. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: POV 我真的以為找到Olive Young. (2) [Logo]: 밀알복지재단. (3) [Variety]: Olive Young ?. (4) [Variety]: Nope.... (5) [Variety]: (是完全不同的組織)

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a white ruffled off-shoulder top with stylized red eye makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between the interior of a modern car with black leather seats and an exterior view of a multi-story glass commercial building with Korean signage and green street-side trees.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A playful, mid-tempo acoustic melody featuring bright, percussive melodic hits resembling a glockenspiel or toy piano begins. The tonality is major and upbeat, creating a whimsical atmosphere. No vocals or ambient noise are present. (2) A sharp, metallic 'ding' or chime sound effect triggers, coinciding with a visual cut. This high-frequency transient sound highlights a moment of 'discovery.' The background music continues its light, rhythmic pattern. (3) The playful melody continues briefly before resolving with a final, slightly slower melodic motif that signals a comical conclusion. The audio is studio-clean with a high signal-to-noise ratio and no technical distortion.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video captures a relatable and humorous moment of visual misidentification where the creator mistakes a charity foundation's logo for that of the popular Korean retail store, Olive Young. The use of playful music and exaggerated facial expressions enhances the comedic effect for a social media audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The comical effect relies on the visual similarity of the green/red circular logo on the building to the Olive Young brand identity.
